ops.text:
RECOVERY RESULTS (E25 completed, n=200). Labeling completed cleanly: resume was 94 done + 106 to label, 106/106 succeeded, 0 FAIL lines, 0 dupes, all 200 in-sample, every sample key labeled, 0 invalid schema values. Identical prompt (int-v1) and forced-summary context render as the original 94. agreement.json + divergent.jsonl recomputed over the full 200; stale n=79 agreement.json snapshotted to out/pre_recovery_snapshot/. Recovery-run spend ~$1.6 (opus $5/$25; measured 734,708 prompt chars over 106 rows + schema overhead). Recovery-lane spend under the $6 cap.

HEADLINE (n=200, prompt_version=int-v1):
- agreement_overall_raw = 0.670, boot95 [0.605, 0.735] (k=134/200)
- agreement_overall_pop_reweighted = 0.781, boot95 [0.723, 0.829]
- core 2x2: triage_steer&int_change=106, triage_steer&int_nochange=8, triage_noise&int_change=58, triage_noise&int_nochange=28

KEY FINDING — divergence is one-directional and confirms the pre-registered hypothesis. 58 of 66 disagreements are triage_noise->int_change vs only 8 triage_steer->int_nochange: the counterfactual-intervention framing is strictly MORE inclusive than triage's taxonomy. It flags behaviorally-active messages that triage scores as non-steering, driven by change_kind=new_work (operational directives / new tasks that ADD work — 'commit and push', 'also add tests') and resolve_choice — exactly the categories triage's 'must fault work or resolve a choice the ASSISTANT raised' constraint deliberately excludes.

DIVERGENT CATEGORIES (ranked by disagree_rate; all triage-noise side): new_task 0.86 (n=22; 19 noise->change, kinds new_work 16/corrective 3/none 3); question 0.73 (n=15; 11 noise->change, new_work 7/corrective 3); operational_directive 0.72 (n=25; 18 noise->change, new_work 11/resolve_choice 4); other 0.67 (n=6; 4); status_update 0.33 (n=18; 6, mostly still none=12). Triage-steer side barely moves: incorrect_change 0.13 (2 steer->nochange), wrong_approach 0.12 (3), direction 0.07 (3) — a handful of bare-approval/inert rows. Zero disagreement: unwanted_action, style_violation, premature (all 12/12/10 agree=1.0).

WHY pop-reweighted (0.78) > raw (0.67): direction dominates the population (55.4% share) and agrees at 0.925; the high-divergence cats are small-share noise categories (new_task 7.7%, operational_directive 8.2%, question 1.8%), so reweighting to population downweights the divergence the non-proportional sample over-represents.

SENSITIVITY (fidelity): excluding the 30 full-fidelity-triage rows -> summary-matched (n=170) agree 0.659; full-fidelity subset (n=30) agree 0.733. Fidelity mismatch does not materially move the estimate (full rows agree slightly higher). All 30 flagged rows are now labeled (was 10/30 at the n=79 stale snapshot).

PENDING-E15 discipline honored: point estimates + bootstrap 95% CIs only, NO promote/kill verdict. Feeds E26 loss choice + E28 label cleaning. Artifacts attached: labels.jsonl (200), agreement.json, divergent.jsonl (66), run_recovery.log. Raw retained on disk under E25/out for verify-lane re-derivation.
